name: proofsheet
description: Image generation, refinement, and reusable themes for Claude Code. Backed by Nano Banana (Gemini) or gpt-image-1 (OpenAI).

plugins.name: proofsheet
plugins.description: Generate, refine, and theme images via Nano Banana or gpt-image-1. Commands: /welcome, /image, /refine, /new-theme, /themes.
